user.title: Connect a developer account
user.description: Select a brand and enter the developer application credentials. The account entry will be named automatically.

authorize.title: Authorize {brand}
authorize.description: Open the [authorization page]({authorization_url}), complete login, then paste the entire redirected URL. An error page at example.com is expected; copy its address-bar URL. Codes are single-use and are not stored.

vehicle.title: Select a vehicle
vehicle.description: Choose one vehicle authorized for this account.

vehicle_name.title: Name the vehicle
vehicle_name.description: Choose a Home Assistant name for {vehicle}.

vehicle_discovery_failed.title: Vehicle discovery unavailable
vehicle_discovery_failed.description: The account was authorized, but its vehicle list could not be loaded. Retry or enter a car ID manually.

no_vehicles.title: No vehicles returned
no_vehicles.description: The account returned no authorized vehicles. Retry or use manual entry if you know the car ID.

manual.title: Enter vehicle manually
manual.description: Use this fallback only when automatic vehicle discovery is unavailable.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate account
reauth_confirm.description: This account can no longer refresh its access token. Continue to authorize it again using the saved developer credentials.

reconfigure.title: Update developer credentials
reconfigure.description: Update the developer application credentials for this existing brand. Leave Client secret empty to retain it.

validation_retry.title: Retry account validation
validation_retry.description: Authorization succeeded, but the vehicle list could not be checked. Continue to retry without repeating login.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the vehicle API.
error.invalid_auth: Authorization failed. Start again and paste a newly redirected URL.
error.invalid_redirect_uri: Enter a valid HTTPS redirect URI.
error.invalid_vehicle: The account could not read the required vehicle data.
error.oauth_missing_code: The pasted URL has no authorization code. Complete login and vehicle consent, then paste the final https://example.com/redirect URL.
error.oauth_missing_refresh_token: The provider accepted the authorization code but returned no refresh token. Start a new authorization attempt.
error.oauth_provider_error: The provider returned an authorization error. Start again, sign in with the connected-car account, select a vehicle, and approve access.
error.oauth_redirect_mismatch: This is not the registered redirect URL. Paste the complete address that starts with https://example.com/redirect after login and vehicle consent.
error.oauth_state_mismatch: This URL belongs to a different or expired setup attempt. Keep one setup window open and use its newly generated authorization link.
error.oauth_token_exchange_failed: The provider rejected the authorization code. Verify the selected brand, Client ID, Client Secret, and exact redirect URI, then start again with a new code.

abort.all_vehicles_configured: Every vehicle returned by this account is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the vehicle API.
abort.wrong_account: The authorized account cannot access any existing vehicle.

init.title: Polling options
init.description: Choose how often enabled vehicle entities are refreshed.

vehicle.title: Select a vehicle
vehicle.description: Choose an unconfigured vehicle from this account.

vehicle_name.title: Name the vehicle
vehicle_name.description: Choose a Home Assistant name for {vehicle}.

vehicle_discovery_failed.title: Vehicle discovery unavailable
vehicle_discovery_failed.description: The vehicle list could not be loaded. Retry or enter a car ID manually.

no_vehicles.title: No vehicles returned
no_vehicles.description: This account returned no vehicles. Retry or use manual entry.

manual.title: Enter vehicle manually
manual.description: Use this fallback only when automatic discovery is unavailable.

reconfigure.title: Rename vehicle
reconfigure.description: Renaming preserves its device and entity identities. Remove and add the vehicle to replace it.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the vehicle API.
error.invalid_auth: The account needs to be reauthenticated.
error.invalid_vehicle: The account could not read the required data for this car ID.

abort.all_vehicles_configured: Every vehicle returned by this account is already configured.
abort.reauth_required: Reauthentication was started for this account.

cannot_connect.message: Unable to connect to the Hyundai/Kia developer API.

invalid_auth.message: The Hyundai/Kia developer account needs to be reauthenticated.

update_failed.message: Unable to update any enabled vehicle endpoint.
